mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_edge (road_id, road_name, begin_node, end_node, length, type,about,uploader,created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roadId}, #{roadName}, #{beginNode}, #{endNode}, #{length},#{type},#{about},#{uploader},NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO road_node (node_id, node_name,gis,about,uploader, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{gis} , #{about} , #{uploader} , NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE road_edge SET road_id = #{roadId}, road_name = #{roadName}, begin_node = #{beginNode}, end_node = #{endNode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE road_node SET node_id = #{nodeId}, node_name = #{nodeName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE road_edge SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE road_node SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
